title: Tripura Bhairavī Sādhana
description: The sixth of the Daśa Mahāvidyās, Tripura Bhairavī is the fierce (*ugra*) form of Tripurasundarī — the goddess of *tapas* (spiritual austerity) and the transformative fire of practice, blending the beauty-consciousness of Sundarī with the purifying fire of Bhairavī. High caution — an advanced Śrī Vidyā Mahāvidyā rite positioned within the Śrī Cakra frame. Preserved here as heritage / source materi
